title: Finish contract + durable workspace contract for cli-tier external executors
action: In the External Executors section of swarming-reference.md, per the approved plan (Gate 2+3, 2026-07-10) and advisor notes: (1) extend dispatch steps 2-3 with a required finish contract — the prompt instructs the external worker to write .bee/workers/<cell-id>.result.json as its last act with fields cell_id, outcome (done|blocked|handoff|noop — the cli TRANSPORT of the same four status tokens, not a second contract), verify_command, verify_passed, files_changed, notes; add an orchestrator acceptance rule mirroring harness-§11.3: a cli run counts only if the file exists, parses, and carries a valid outcome; missing/garbled/invalid = failed run routed to the existing rescue ladder (resume -> 2 rounds -> [BLOCKED]); the 0018 goal-check stays on top unchanged — the result file is a signal, never the evidence. (2) add a short durable-contract statement: .bee/workers/<cell-id>.prompt.md IS the contract at a stable path, re-readable by the worker and referenced (not re-pasted) in resume rounds; plus ONE conditional sentence: if dispatch ever runs in an isolated worktree, surface the contract in that workspace's AGENTS.md. Sync SKILL.md only if one sentence drifts. Patterns adopted from repository-harness SYMPHONY_SCOPE.md §4.4/§4.6.

truths: A cli run with a missing, unparseable, or invalid-outcome result file is deterministically a failed run entering the existing rescue ladder — never silently waited on and never accepted
result.json outcome vocabulary is exactly the four existing status tokens; the reference states explicitly it is the cli transport of the same contract as the native markdown results
The 0018 goal-check wording is unchanged: the result file never substitutes for orchestrator re-verification
artifacts: Updated External Executors section in skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md containing the result.json field list and the acceptance rule
A durable-contract paragraph naming .bee/workers/<cell-id>.prompt.md as the stable contract path with the single worktree/AGENTS.md conditional sentence
prohibitions: No new helper scripts, schemas, or hooks
No worktree-dispatch machinery beyond the one conditional sentence
No changes outside the two listed files

trace.outcome: External Executors protocol now has a file-checkable finish contract (result.json, four-token transport, accept-by-file rule routing missing/garbled results to rescue) and a durable workspace contract (prompt file as stable contract path + single worktree/AGENTS.md conditional), adopted from repository-harness SYMPHONY_SCOPE 4.4/4.6 per plan and advisor notes.

  "green": "both greps hit; test_lib 124 passed, 0 failed (fresh run 2026-07-10)",
  "red_failure_evidence": "git show HEAD:skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md | grep -ci 'transport|result.json' -> 0, exit 1: neither pattern existed in the pre-change file, so the verify greps fail on HEAD and pass only after this cell's edit",
  "judge": "bee_cells.mjs judge: intact, no undeclared test/CI/lockfile changes",
